hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreCompact","additionalContext":"IMPORTANT: Preserve across compaction: (1) Current task/plan and progress (2) File paths being actively edited (3) Error context or debugging state (4) Key decisions made this session (5) Pending TODOs or next steps"}}'

statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cwd'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); branch=$(git -C "$cwd" symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); dir=$(basename "$cwd"); ctx_str=''; [ -n "$used" ] && ctx_str=$(printf ' | ctx %.0f%%' "$used"); branch_str=''; [ -n "$branch" ] && branch_str=$(printf ' (%s)' "$branch"); printf '%s%s | %s%s' "$dir" "$branch_str" "$model" "$ctx_str"
